creator: ksraman.91@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 187985
Pull request on Abraca project which has the fix

The audio/abraca port is not reproducible. As part of reproducible-builds effort, the port should be reproducible and should not depend on build environment. The waftools/man.py file has gzip which has current system date in metadata and makes the build not reproducible. Please see the below url to know more about reproducible-builds project.
https://reproducible-builds.org/
